warnings: All entries are proposed policy candidate signals. TPA, CDE, SEL, and GOV remain canonical owners; this artifact does not adopt or activate any policy.
Suggested policy shapes are recommendations to the owner system; final shape is the owner's to set.
failure_prevented: Recurring authority-boundary gaps remaining without any policy candidate signal addressed to the owner system before the next promotion attempt.
signal_improved: Each authority-boundary gap from feedback items has a proposed policy candidate signal with explicit suggested owner, suggested shape, and required evidence before adoption.

candidates.title: Certification completeness gate suggestion for SEL
candidates.policy_gap_observed: SEL stays observe-only because the certification evidence set is partial, but no policy candidate signal exists requiring the missing certification inputs to be enumerated upstream.
candidates.failure_prevented: Repeat observe-only enforcement with no policy signal addressing the certification-set gap.
candidates.signal_improved: SEL has a named policy candidate signal describing the certification completeness gap and suggested gate shape.
candidates.suggested_policy_shape: Required-certification-input set: explicit list of certification artifact types and statuses that must be present before SEL may consider the case complete.
required_evidence_before_adoption: Certification artifact schema confirmation by SEL/GOV
Source-artifact lineage showing certification inputs trace to canonical owners

candidates.title: Trust policy warn-boundary suggestion for TPA
candidates.policy_gap_observed: Near-miss record shows the warn gate caught a potential promotion bypass, but no policy candidate signal records the boundary condition or recommends explicit warn-trigger fields.
candidates.failure_prevented: Loss of the boundary observation that prevented the near miss; recurrence going unrecorded.
candidates.signal_improved: TPA has a named policy candidate signal capturing the warn-boundary observation and a suggested explicit-trigger shape.
candidates.suggested_policy_shape: Explicit warn-trigger fields naming partial-eval, partial-cert, partial-replay, and over-budget conditions; each trigger names a downstream consumer (CDE).
required_evidence_before_adoption: Source near-miss record with prevented_by populated
TPA artifact reason_code mapping to suggested triggers
CDE confirmation that suggested triggers map to CDE inputs

candidates.title: Governance fallback-reduction policy candidate signal
candidates.policy_gap_observed: Multiple non-loop systems still report stub_fallback while the bottleneck/leverage records show this as a high-leverage gap; no governance policy candidate signal names the systems and replacement signals.
candidates.failure_prevented: Fallback rows continuing to be reported as if artifact-backed, with no policy signal naming the systems and the required replacement signal per row.
candidates.signal_improved: GOV has a named policy candidate signal listing high-leverage stub_fallback systems and the artifact-backed replacement signal needed for each.
candidates.affected_authority_boundary: Governance source-of-truth posture for non-loop systems
candidates.suggested_policy_shape: Per-system fallback-reduction registry: system_id, current_data_source, replacement_signal_needed, priority, owner_for_replacement.
required_evidence_before_adoption: Owner system confirmation per fallback row

candidates.title: CDE override-audit policy candidate signal
candidates.policy_gap_observed: Override count remains 'unknown' because no override audit log exists; CDE has no documented requirement for override evidence to be recorded as an auditable artifact.
candidates.failure_prevented: Overrides occurring without an audit trail that downstream MET signals can reference.
candidates.signal_improved: CDE/GOV have a named policy candidate signal recommending an override audit log shape and retention rules.
candidates.suggested_policy_shape: Override audit log artifact: override_id, source_context, reason_observed, expiry_date, conversion_status, source_artifacts_used.
required_evidence_before_adoption: artifacts/dashboard_metrics/override_audit_log_record.json present and populated by canonical owner
